sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check target position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('O', 'b'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
